items.title: How to Watch the 2026 FIFA World Cup: Scores, Schedule, Dates for Every Match
items.summary: We know all the matches and dates for the group stage games for next summer's 48-team soccer bonanza.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Summerville scores 'sizzler' as Netherlands retake lead
items.summary: Crysencio Summerville's "sizzler" of a goal helps Netherlands retake the lead against Japan in their Group F fixture at the 2026 World Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Guthrie spearheads Northants push despite Bancroft, Bracey resistance
items.summary: Gloucestershire battle after being made to follow on but require something special on day four
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
